arts.ttl: Milan aim to secure Jimenez’s future, plans to renegotiate with Real Madrid
arts.sum: Alex Jimenez has emerged as the surprise star for AC Milan in recent matches, filling in admirably for Theo Hernandez, who is experiencing the most challenging period of his career. The young Spanish full-back, who started against Genoa and Verona, has showcased not only his speed and technical abilities but also his remarkable personality on the pitch.
